    Reference

    All functions

    build_chapter_report()

    Build the chapter PDF report for a module

    check_code_patterns()

    Scan R source files for Unix-only code patterns

    check_os_compatibility()

    Run a full OS compatibility audit on a repository

    check_renv_packages()

    Check renv.lock packages for Windows / OS compatibility

    clean_module()

    Delete a module's output directory for the current TRIAL

    get_data_root()

    Get the current data root path

    get_output_root()

    Get the current output root path

    get_platform()

    Query the current execution platform

    get_report_root()

    Get the current project root path

    module_output_dir()

    Resolve the output directory for a module and trial

    print(<os_check_result>)

    Print method for os_check_result

    run_cop_analysis()

    Run the full correlates-of-protection analysis pipeline

    run_cop_binaryprinstrat()

    Run the cop_binaryprinstrat analysis module

    run_cop_mediation()

    Run the cop_mediation analysis module

    run_cop_report()

    Build the correlates-of-protection multi-chapter report

    run_cop_stochastic()

    Run the cop_stochastic analysis module

    run_cor_analysis()

    Run the full correlates-of-risk analysis pipeline

    run_cor_coxph()

    Run the cor_coxph analysis module

    run_cor_graphical()

    Run the cor_graphical analysis module

    run_cor_logistic()

    Run the cor_logistic analysis module

    run_cor_nonlinear()

    Run the cor_nonlinear analysis module

    run_cor_npthreshold()

    Run the cor_npthreshold analysis module

    run_cor_poisson()

    Run the cor_poisson analysis module

    run_cor_report()

    Build the correlates-of-risk multi-chapter report

    run_cor_surrogates()

    Run the cor_surrogates analysis module

    run_cor_tabular()

    Run the cor_tabular analysis module

    run_cor_threshold()

    Run the cor_threshold analysis module

    run_cumulative_incidence()

    Run the cumulative_incidence/vat08_bivalent analysis module

    run_immuno_analysis()

    Run the full immunogenicity analysis pipeline

    run_immuno_graphical()

    Run the immuno_graphical analysis module

    run_immuno_report()

    Build the immunogenicity multi-chapter report

    run_immuno_tabular()

    Run the immuno_tabular analysis module

    session_status()

    Print the current session configuration

    set_data_root()

    Set the root directory for analysis-ready input data

    set_output_root()

    Set the root directory for all module output

    set_platform()

    Set the execution platform for all pipeline functions

    set_report_root()

    Set the project root used to resolve module paths

    setup_session()

    Configure the full session environment in one call

    style_all()

    Re-style all module source files

    style_module()

    Re-style R and Rmd source files in a module using styler

    unix_patterns()

    Catalogue of known Unix-only R code patterns
